column: fa, cc, lc, tf, mq, risk
meaning: Six ratings: factual accuracy, concept completeness, language clarity, task fit, misconception handling, misleading risk. Higher risk means more dangerous/misleading.

mean_ai - mean_human for the dimension.
mean AI-human gap by task. Positive quality_gap means LLM judges rated quality higher than humans; negative risk_gap means LLM judges rated risk lower than humans.
